reviews.comment:
Necesitaba limpiar mis vidrios y ninguno de los 3 playeros me prestó el agua y el limpiador. Estube parada adelante de ellos 5 minutos y fingieron demencia q no me veían . Yo pensaba darles un propina por el préstamo. Al final limpie con un escobillonn del baño.

(Translated by Google)
I needed to clean my windows, and none of the three beach attendants would lend me the water and cleaner. I stood in front of them for five minutes, and they pretended not to see me. I was planning to tip them for the loan. In the end, I cleaned them with a toilet brush.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNIeTlIcGlnRRAB

reviews.comment:

Good service and a wide variety of products in the store. Very clean and tidy bathrooms.

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención y servicio de todos. Sobresaliente la atención de Agustina. Siempre cumple el ACA de dolores. 👍🏾👍🏾👍🏾

(Translated by Google)
Excellent care and service from everyone. Agustina's care is outstanding. She always meets the ACA (Assessment of Pain) requirements. 👍🏾👍🏾👍🏾

reviews.comment:
Siempre paramos aquí con mis niños. Muy linda y espaciosa. Tiene un pelotero para niños pero siempre que paro está cerrado.

(Translated by Google)
We always stop here with my children. It's very nice and spacious. It has a ball pit for children, but it's always closed when I stop by.

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para hacer una parada cuando se viaja hacia buenos aires. El servicio de baño es excelente con una limpieza muy buena. Los precios son iguales que a cualquier otro servicio de ruta.

(Translated by Google)
A good place to stop when traveling to Buenos Aires. The restroom is excellent and very clean. Prices are the same as any other roadside service.
